requirements.title: Physician navigation to target nodule
requirements.description: Physicians need to navigate a bronchoscope to a target nodule identified in preoperative imaging in order to obtain a tissue biopsy.

test_cases.title: Physician navigation to nodule demonstration
test_cases.notes: Covers UN-001; demonstration-level verification of user need

requirements.title: Peripheral airway reach
requirements.description: Physicians need to reach target nodules located in peripheral (small-diameter, high-generation) airway branches that are difficult or impossible to access with manual bronchoscopy.

test_cases.title: Peripheral airway reach demonstration
test_cases.notes: Covers UN-002; demonstration of peripheral reach capability

requirements.title: No unintended airway injury
requirements.description: Patients need assurance that navigation will not cause unintended injury to the airway.

test_cases.title: No unintended airway contact demonstration
test_cases.notes: Covers UN-003; demonstration of safety user need

requirements.title: Physician supervisory authority
requirements.description: Physicians need to retain supervisory authority over the procedure including the ability to pause or abort navigation at any time.

test_cases.title: Operator pause and abort demonstration
test_cases.notes: Covers UN-004; demonstration of supervisory authority user need

requirements.title: Procedure record
requirements.description: Clinical staff need a record of the navigation procedure to support post-procedure review.

test_cases.title: Procedure log review
test_cases.notes: Covers UN-005; inspection-level verification of record-keeping user need

requirements.title: System navigation capability
requirements.description: The system shall enable a physician to navigate a flexible bronchoscope to target pulmonary nodules identified in preoperative imaging.
requirements.notes: Derived from UN-001 and UN-002; verification: Analysis and Demonstration

test_cases.title: Navigation to target pulmonary nodule
test_cases.notes: Covers SYS-REQ-001; analysis of reach capability against system-level requirement

requirements.title: Positional confidence for biopsy
requirements.description: The system shall provide the physician with sufficient positional confidence to perform a tissue biopsy at the target location.

test_cases.title: Positional confidence at target location
test_cases.notes: Covers SYS-REQ-002; analysis of positional confidence at target

requirements.title: Prevent unintended scope motion
requirements.description: The system shall prevent unintended scope advancement or steering that could result in airway wall injury.

test_cases.title: No wall-contact guidance commands issued
test_cases.notes: Covers SYS-REQ-003; test of safety constraint at system level

requirements.title: Respond to pause and abort commands
requirements.description: The system shall respond to physician pause and abort commands within a clinically acceptable time.

test_cases.title: Pause and abort command response time
test_cases.notes: Covers SYS-REQ-004; system-level test of command response

requirements.title: Generate procedure record
requirements.description: The system shall generate a complete procedure record suitable for post-procedure clinical review.

test_cases.title: Procedure record completeness
test_cases.notes: Covers SYS-REQ-005; inspection of system-level record requirement

requirements.title: Detect and respond to navigation accuracy loss
requirements.description: The system shall detect conditions under which navigation accuracy cannot be assured and shall prevent scope motion under those conditions.

test_cases.title: Navigation halt on accuracy loss
test_cases.notes: Covers SYS-REQ-006; system-level test of accuracy-loss response

requirements.title: 30 Hz fused pose estimate
requirements.description: The RBNS shall produce a fused bronchoscope tip pose estimate at a rate of no less than 30 Hz during the NAVIGATE phase.

test_cases.title: Fused pose estimate rate at 30 Hz

requirements.title: Uncertainty ellipsoid on IF-01
requirements.description: Each fused tip pose estimate shall include a 3D position uncertainty representation expressed as an ellipsoid with semi-axis lengths in millimeters.
requirements.notes: Allocated to 1.4; verification: Inspection and Test

test_cases.title: Uncertainty ellipsoid field presence on IF-01

requirements.title: CBCT registration within 4 seconds
requirements.description: The RBNS shall complete image-to-patient registration within 4 seconds of receiving a Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) volume.

requirements.title: Replanning inhibition under uncertainty
requirements.description: The RBNS shall inhibit path replanning when the tip position uncertainty exceeds the configured replanning threshold.

test_cases.title: Replanning inhibited when uncertainty exceeds threshold

requirements.title: Configurable replanning threshold
requirements.description: The replanning uncertainty threshold shall be a configurable parameter modifiable without software rebuild.
requirements.notes: Allocated to 2.2; verification: Inspection and Demonstration

requirements.title: HOLD within one guidance cycle of uncertainty exceedance
requirements.description: The RBNS shall command zero scope advancement (HOLD) within one guidance cycle of the tip position uncertainty exceeding the configured threshold.

test_cases.title: HOLD command within one guidance cycle of threshold exceedance

requirements.title: Guidance command magnitude limiting
requirements.description: All guidance commands shall be magnitude-limited to configurable maximum advance rate and maximum steering angle values prior to transmission on IF-07.

requirements.title: RBNS procedure state machine
requirements.description: The RBNS shall implement the procedure state machine with states IDLE NAVIGATE CONFIRM BIOPSY FAULT and ABORT with transitions as defined in the RBNS procedure state machine model (D7).
requirements.notes: Allocated to 4.0; verification: Test and Demonstration

test_cases.title: Procedure state machine full transition coverage

requirements.title: Supervisor as primary external interface point
requirements.description: All command control status and logging communication between the RBNS and external systems shall be routed through the Procedure Supervisor with the exception of continuous sensor and imaging feeds (IF-EX-02a IF-EX-03 IF-EX-08) which connect directly to their consuming subsystem.
requirements.notes: Allocated to 4.0 architecture constraint; verification: Inspection and Analysis

requirements.title: Lost-tracking alert within 100 ms
requirements.description: The RBNS shall report a lost-tracking alert to the Procedure Supervisor within 100 ms of tracking loss detection.

requirements.title: Cease guidance commands within 50 ms of interlock deassert
requirements.description: Upon deassertion of the motion enable signal (IF-EX-06a) the RBNS shall cease issuing guidance commands within 50 ms.

test_cases.title: Guidance command cessation within 50 ms of interlock deassert

requirements.title: FAULT state and HOLD within 100 ms of lost-tracking
requirements.description: Upon receiving a lost-tracking alert the Procedure Supervisor shall transition to the FAULT state and command HOLD on IF-EX-04 within 100 ms.

test_cases.title: FAULT state and HOLD within 100 ms of lost-tracking

requirements.title: Degraded pose estimate on single-source failure
requirements.description: The RBNS shall maintain a degraded tip pose estimate upon failure of any single localization source and shall flag the estimate as DEGRADED on IF-03.
requirements.notes: Allocated to 1.4; verification: Test and Analysis

test_cases.title: Degraded pose estimate on single-source failure

requirements.title: Path computation within 1 second
requirements.description: The RBNS shall compute an airway path from current position to a newly commanded target within 1 second.

test_cases.title: Path computation within 1 second on target change

requirements.title: End-to-end guidance latency 200 ms
requirements.description: The end-to-end latency from a tip pose estimate (IF-01) to the corresponding guidance command transmission (IF-EX-04) shall not exceed 200 ms.
requirements.notes: Allocated to 2.0 and 4.0; verification: Test and Analysis

requirements.title: CBCT trigger phase gating
requirements.description: The RBNS shall issue CBCT acquisition triggers (IF-EX-02b) only during the NAVIGATE and CONFIRM procedure phases.

test_cases.title: CBCT trigger issued only in NAVIGATE and CONFIRM

requirements.title: Procedure event logging
requirements.description: The RBNS shall record all state transitions replanning events fault events and the tip pose trace to the Procedure Data Recorder (IF-EX-07) with timestamps of 10 ms resolution or better.
requirements.notes: Allocated to 4.0; verification: Test and Inspection

test_cases.title: Procedure event log completeness and timestamp resolution

requirements.title: Tip articulation range (TBD)
requirements.description: The Guidance Command Generator shall support distal tip articulation commands of up to [TBD] degrees per axis sufficient to follow airway centerline curvature at branch points up to the generation depth required by SYS-REQ-001.
requirements.notes: Allocated to GuidanceCommandGenerator; TBD pending kinematic reach analysis; verification: Analysis and Test

test_cases.title: Tip articulation range kinematic analysis
test_cases.notes: Covers COMP-REQ-001; analysis verification; prerequisite: airway centerline geometry dataset

requirements.title: Uncertainty ellipsoid bound (TBD)
requirements.description: The Sensor Fusion and Uncertainty Estimator shall bound the fused position uncertainty ellipsoid such that the 95% confidence volume does not exceed [TBD].
requirements.notes: Allocated to SensorFusionUncertaintyEstimator; TBD pending EKF covariance analysis; verification: Analysis and Test

test_cases.title: EKF uncertainty ellipsoid bound analysis
test_cases.notes: Covers COMP-REQ-002; analysis verification; prerequisite: FK drift and vision rate characterization data

requirements.title: Replanning threshold default (TBD)
requirements.description: The Real-Time Path Updater shall default the replanning inhibition threshold to an uncertainty ellipsoid semi-axis of [TBD] configurable per SUB-REQ-005.
requirements.notes: Allocated to RealTimePathUpdater; TBD pending parametric analysis; verification: Analysis and Test

test_cases.title: Replanning threshold parametric analysis
test_cases.notes: Covers COMP-REQ-003; analysis verification; prerequisite: airway geometry dataset and tissue clearance tolerance
